title: B1 Exam Skills & Full Review — Conditionals & Passive Review
objectives: Hiểu và áp dụng: conditionals & passive review
Học 24 từ vựng theo chủ đề tuần 13
Hoàn thành 40 câu hỏi trắc nghiệm tăng dần độ khó
Bám sát mục tiêu tuần: B1 Exam Skills & Full Review
lesson: **B1 Exam Skills & Full Review.** The B1 **exam** tests four skills: **listening**, **reading**, **grammar** and **vocabulary**. To do well, **revise** every verb **tense** (present, past, perfect, future), conditionals, the **passive**, **reported** speech and relative clauses. In the **reading** **section**, skim for the main idea and scan for details. In **listening**, predict and listen for key words. Use a clear **strategy**: read each **question** carefully, watch the **time limit**, and check your **answers**. Identify your **strengths** and your **weaknesses**, and **practise** the areas where you make **mistakes**. Stay **confident**, **manage** your time, and aim to **achieve** at least 70% to **pass**. This week mixes all grammar and vocabulary from the whole course in a full review.
